entityType.composite_budget_fund_fiscal_: Composite entity type where each record is a budget. Records include budget data along with related fund, fiscal year, created_by and updated_by user data when present.
entityType.composite_fund._description: Composite entity type where each record is a fund. Records include fund data along with related ledger, fund type, created_by and updated_by user data when present.
entityType.composite_holdings_record._de: Composite entity type where each record is a holdings record. Records include holdings data along with related location, library, instance, created_by and updated_by user data when present.
entityType.composite_instances._descript: Composite entity type where each record is an instance. Records include instance data along with related instance type, status, date type, created_by and updated_by user data when present.
entityType.composite_invoice__voucher_li: Composite entity type where each record is a combination of a voucher line and one of its fund distributions. Every distinct pairing of voucher line and fund distribution constitutes a separate record. Records include related fund type, expense class, and voucher data when present.

Composite entity type where each record is a voucher line. Records include voucher line data along with related voucher, invoice, fund, fund type, ledger, vendor organization, created by user, and updated by user data when present.

Composite entity type where each record represents a voucher line with a fund distribution. Every distinct pairing of voucher line and fund constitutes a separate record. Records include related invoice, invoice line, vendor organization, purchase order, and instance data when present.
entityType.composite_invoice_line_fund_d: Composite entity type where each record is a combination of invoice, invoice line, fund, and purchase order line data. every distinct combination of invoice, invoice line, fund, and purchase order line constitutes a separate record.
entityType.composite_invoice_line._descr: Composite entity type where each record is an invoice line. Records include invoice line data along with related invoice, created_by, and updated_by user data when present.
entityType.composite_item_details._descr: Composite entity type where each record is an item. Records include item data along with related location, call number, material type, holdings, instance, loan type, created_by and updated_by user data when present.
entityType.composite_loan_details._descr: Composite entity type where each record is a loan. Records include loan data along with related loan policy, loan type, location, library, service point, item, material type, holdings, instance, loan user, user group, created_by and updated_by user data when present.
entityType.composite_order_invoice_analy: Composite entity type where each record is a combination of purchase order and purchase order line. Every distinct pairing of purchase order and purchase order line constitutes a separate record. Records include related instance, invoice, organization, fund, expense class, fiscal year, fund type, created_by and updated_by user data when present.
entityType.composite_organization._descr: Composite entity type where each record is an organization. Records include organization data along with related created_by and updated_by user data when present.
entityType.composite_po_instance._descri: Composite entity type where each record is a purchase order line. Records include purchase order line data along with related instance, purchase order, organization, created_by and updated_by user data when present.
entityType.composite_receiving_pieces._d: Composite entity type where each record is a receiving piece. Records include piece data along with related item, location, PO, PO line, title, holdings record, created_by and updated_by user data when present.
entityType.composite_receiving_titles._d: Composite entity type where each record is a receiving title. Records include title data along with related PO line, instance, created_by and updated_by user data when present.
entityType.composite_srs_authority._desc: Composite entity type where each record is an SRS MARC authority record.
entityType.composite_srs_bib._descriptio: Composite entity type where each record is an SRS MARC bibliographic record.
entityType.composite_transaction._descri: Composite entity type where each record is a transaction. Records include transaction data along with related fund, fiscal_year, created_by and updated_by user data when present.
entityType.composite_voucher_line__fund_: Composite entity type where each record is a combination of a voucher line and one of its fund distributions. Every distinct pairing of voucher line and fund distribution constitutes a separate record.
entityType.composite_voucher_line__vouch: Composite entity type where each record is a voucher line. Records include voucher line data along with related fund, fund type, ledger, created by user, and updated by user data when present.
entityType.composite_voucher_line_totals: Composite entity type where each record represents the total amount spent per external account number within a ledger, based on voucher lines linked to vouchers and invoices. Includes related ledger and fund data when present.
entityType.composite_voucher._descriptio: Composite entity type where each record is a voucher. Records include voucher data along with related vendor, created_by, and updated_by data when present.

entityType.composite_users_with_open_tra: Composite entity type where each record is a user. Records include user data along with a summary of the user's open transactions counts (including open loans, fees/fines, requests, proxies, and patron blocks).
entityType.simple_agreements_agreement._: Simple entity type for agreement (subscription_agreement) data, including refdata-driven status, type, renewal priority, perpetual flag, content review and reason for closure.
entityType.simple_agreements_org._descri: Simple entity type for agreement <-> organization links, exposing the org-link role and the proxy mod-organizations UUID.
entityType.simple_agreements_agreement_l: Simple entity type for agreement line (entitlement) data, including the underlying ERM resource type and subtype.
